first.detail: Show their grandchild's character token, then point to the grandchild.

other.action: Resolve the Grandmother without waking them.
other.detail: If their grandchild was killed by the Demon tonight, the Grandmother dies.

first.detail: They choose a living player; make either the Sailor or that player drunk.

other.detail: Remove the previous drunkenness. They choose a living player; make either the Sailor or that player drunk.

first.detail: They choose two alive players; show how many woke tonight due to their own ability.

other.detail: They choose two alive players; show how many woke tonight due to their own ability.
They choose a different player from last night. If it is the Demon, wake the Demon, show the Exorcist token and point to the Exorcist; the Demon does not act.
Remove last night's reminders. They choose two players to protect; make one of them drunk.
They choose a player and guess that player's character. If wrong, the Gambler dies.

other.action: Resolve the Gossip without waking them.
other.detail: If their public statement was true, choose an unprotected player to die.

first.action: Wake the Courtier if they have not used their ability.
first.detail: They may choose a character to make drunk for three days and nights.

other.action: Resolve the Courtier timer, then wake them if unused.
other.detail: Reduce the drunk timer. If unused, they may choose a character to make drunk for three days and nights.

other.action: Wake the Professor if they have not used their ability.
other.detail: They may choose a dead player; if that player is a Townsfolk, they become alive.

first.detail: If there are 7 or more players, show arbitrary Minions and three good bluffs. Let them act as their Demon; then wake the real Demon and show the Lunatic and any chosen targets.

other.detail: Let them act as their Demon. Then wake the real Demon and show any chosen targets.

other.action: Resolve the Tinker without waking them.
Resolve the Moonchild without waking them.
other.detail: If they chose a player when they died today and that player is good, that player dies.

first.detail: Show every Outsider character in play.

other.action: Wake the Godfather if an Outsider died today.
other.detail: They choose a player, who dies.

first.detail: They choose a living player to survive execution tomorrow.

other.detail: They choose a living player other than last night's choice to survive execution tomorrow.

other.action: Wake the Assassin if they have not used their ability.
other.detail: They may choose a player, who dies even if protected.

other.action: Wake the Zombuul if no one died during the day.
other.detail: They choose a player, who dies.

first.detail: They choose a player to poison.

other.detail: They choose a player to poison; the previously poisoned player dies.
You may resurrect one player chosen last night. They choose two players, who die.
If charged, they choose three players. Otherwise, they choose one player or no one to charge.
